units.summary: 搬进4B，走廊箱子摔了，Mrs. Henderson和Jake帮你搬东西。暖气不热，Jake帮修。

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: You just arrived in America alone. Your partner is still overseas. You're moving into apartment 4B — and your boxes just crashed in the hallway. （你独自来到美国。伴侣还在国内。你正搬进4B公寓——箱子在走廊摔了一地。）
你拖着箱子走进走廊，箱子摔了。Mrs. Henderson打开门。

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Oh! Are you okay?

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Yes, I'm okay. Sorry... the noise...

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Don't worry! Are you the new neighbor? 4B?

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Yes. I'm moving in today.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Welcome! I'm Mrs. Henderson. 4A. Right next door.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目1 — 新知识点①首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 词汇-move in（搬进来）
items.prompt: "Moving in" means:
items.feedback: "Move in = 搬进新家。'I'm moving in today' = 我今天搬进来。"

entries.text: Jake从楼上跑下来。

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Hey! Do you need help?

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目2 — 新知识点②首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 句型-接受帮助的回应
items.prompt: Jake asks "Do you need help?" You want to say yes. What do you say?
items.feedback: "想接受帮助时，'Yes, please!' 简单又礼貌。"

items.title: 🎭 继续对话（题目之后剧情继续）

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: Jake is right above you — in 5B. He talks fast, but he's friendly. （Jake就住你正楼上——5B。他说话很快，但人很友好。）
三个人把箱子搬进4B。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Yes, please!

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: I'm Jake. 5B. Upstairs.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Nice to meet you.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Here — cookies! I made them today. For you!

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目3 — 新知识点③首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-接受礼物/食物时的感谢
items.prompt: Mrs. Henderson gives you cookies as a welcome gift. What's the best response?
items.feedback: "在美国，邻居送小礼物时，直接开心收下说 'Thank you so much!' 就好。不需要推辞。"

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: You take the cookies. They smell sweet and warm. Then, when you step inside your new apartment, you notice something else — it's cold. （你接过饼干。它们闻起来又甜又暖。可当你走进新公寓时，又注意到另一件事——里面很冷。）
你进了公寓，发现很冷。
Jake弄好了。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Thank you so much!

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Mrs. H makes the best cookies. You owe me dinner now. Just kidding!

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: It's cold in here...

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Oh — the heater is off. Let me fix it.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Done. It'll be warm soon.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目4 — 新知识点④首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 词汇-heater / cold
items.prompt: Match the English words with their meanings:
items.feedback: "Heater = 暖气。公寓冷的时候可以跟房东说 'The heater is not working.'"

entries.text: Mrs. Henderson准备走了。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Thank you, Jake.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: No problem.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: If you need anything — knock on my door. 4A.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Same. 5B.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目5 — 新知识点⑤首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 句型-Who lived here before me?（问之前的住户）
items.prompt: You want to ask: who was in this apartment before you?
items.feedback: "'Who lived here before me?' = 我之前谁住在这里？before = 之前，after = 之后。"

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: The hallway goes quiet. Your new apartment finally feels still. Later that night, you open a kitchen drawer and find a small note. （走廊重新安静下来。你的新公寓终于平静了。那天晚上晚些时候，你打开厨房抽屉，发现了一张小纸条。）
两人安静了一秒。
他们离开。你打开厨房抽屉，看到一张便利贴：
你把它放回去了。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Who lived here before me?

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Mrs. H's son. Ryan.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: That's a story for another day, dear.

items.title: 📍 巩固区（2题）
items.content:
### 题目6 — 知识点①巩固【组装层】 **巩固：** `move in` → 升级为句子拼装（新句子，非重复） | **项目** | **内容** | | --- | --- | | **题型** | T3 句子拼装 🔤 | | **题目** | You want to tell someone: I moved in last week. | | **词块** | `I` / `moved in` / `last week` | | **干扰块** | `moved out` | | **正确** | "I moved in last week." | | **反馈** | "moved in = 搬进来。moved out = 搬走。别搞混！" | ### 题目7 — 知识点④巩固【听辨层】 **巩固：** `heater` → 升级为听音选义 | **项目** | **内容** | | --- | --- | | **题型** | T1 听音选义 🎧 | | **音频** | "The heater is not working. It's very cold." | | **题目** | "Heater" means: | | **选项** | A. 暖气 ✅
B. 冰箱 ❌
C. 电灯 ❌ | | **反馈** | "Heater = 暖气。公寓有问题时可以说：'The heater is not working.'（暖气坏了）" |

items.question_title_zh: 题目6 — 知识点①巩固【组装层】
items.prompt: You want to tell someone: I moved in last week.
items.feedback: "moved in = 搬进来。moved out = 搬走。别搞混！"

items.question_title_zh: 题目7 — 知识点④巩固【听辨层】
items.prompt: "Heater" means:
items.audio: "The heater is not working. It's very cold."
items.feedback: "Heater = 暖气。公寓有问题时可以说：'The heater is not working.'（暖气坏了）"

units.summary: 搬来一周，去还Jake工具，发现他状态很差——被裁员了。你陪他、煮咖啡、帮他查怎么申请补助。

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: One week later, you go to return Jake's tool. When he opens the door, he looks tired and upset. （一周后，你去还Jake的工具。他开门时，看起来又累又低落。）
一周后。你拿着上次借的工具去敲Jake的门。
Jake开门。看起来很累，眼睛红红的。家里很乱。
他明显状态不好。你想关心他。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Hey Jake, I'm returning your tool.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Oh. Hey. Thanks... just put it there.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目1 — 新知识点①首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 句型-Are you okay?（你还好吗）
items.prompt: Jake looks upset. You want to check on him. What do you say?
items.feedback: "'Are you okay?' 是关心朋友最简单安全的说法。温和，不给压力。"

items.title: 🎭 继续对话（题目后剧情继续）

entries.text: 他明显不想一个人待着。你没有走。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Are you okay?

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Yeah... not really. Bad day.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: I'll make coffee.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目2 — 新知识点②首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-I'll make coffee（我来泡咖啡 = 我陪你）
items.prompt: You say "I'll make coffee." Why?
items.feedback: "说 'I'll make coffee' 不只是要喝咖啡——是在说'我不走，我陪你'。用行动表达关心。"

options.label: You want to stay and be with Jake
Jake asked you to make coffee

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: You stay. You make coffee instead of asking more questions. After a moment, Jake finally starts talking. （你没有离开。你先去煮咖啡，没有继续追问。过了一会儿，Jake终于开口了。）
你在Jake的厨房泡了咖啡递给他。他终于开口了。

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: I lost my job. The company cut my whole team.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目3 — 新知识点③首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 词汇-lost my job（失业了）
items.prompt: "I lost my job" means:
items.feedback: "'I lost my job' = 我失业了。最常见的口语说法。"

entries.text: Jake笑了一下。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Oh no... I'm sorry.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: It's not about money... I just felt like I was doing well. And then — gone.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Sorry. You just moved in. You don't need my problems.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: You helped me on my first day. Now I'm here.

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: Jake calms down a little. You take out your phone and start looking for practical help. （Jake稍微冷静了一些。你拿出手机，开始帮他找实际能用的办法。）
你提议帮他查查能不能申请补助。
你在手机上搜索，找到了网页。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Maybe you can get help? From the government?

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Yeah... I should do that.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Let me help you look.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: It says... you need to apply online. And you need your ID.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Okay. I can do that. Thanks.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目4 — 新知识点④首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 词汇-apply / online / ID
items.prompt: Match the English words with their meanings:
items.correct_answer: apply=申请, online=在网上, ID=身份证件 |  | **反馈** | "Apply online = 在网上申请。在美国很多事都要 apply online。"

pairs.right: apply=申请, online=在网上, ID=身份证件

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Hey. Thanks. For real.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目5 — 新知识点⑤首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-That's what neighbors are for（邻居就是互相帮忙的）
items.prompt: Jake says "Thanks. For real." You want to say: that's what neighbors do — we help each other. Best response?
items.feedback: "'That's what neighbors are for' = 邻居就是互相帮忙的嘛。表达'不用谢，应该的'。"

options.label: "You're welcome, please don't bother me again."

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: The next day, Jake seems a little stronger. But his last message shows he's still worried about what could happen next. （第二天，Jake看起来振作了一些。但他最后那条消息说明，他心里还是很担心接下来会发生什么。）
第二天，群消息：
Jake私信你：

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: That's what neighbors are for.

entries.speaker: Jake:** _(笑)_ "You sound like Mrs. H."_第二天，群消息：_**Jake
entries.text: Started looking for new jobs today. 💪

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: So proud of you dear!

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Thanks again. Also — if I can't find a job... I'm scared. Mrs. H's son lost his job too. That's why he had to leave.

items.title: 📍 巩固区（2题）
items.content:
### 题目6 — 知识点③巩固【组装层】

**巩固：** `lost my job` → 升级为句子拼装

|  **项目**  |  **内容**  |
| --- | --- |
|  **题型**  |  T3 句子拼装 🔤  |
|  **题目**  |  Jake wants to tell someone: I lost my job last week.  |
|  **词块**  |  `I` / `lost` / `my job` / `last week`  |
|  **干扰块**  |  `found`  |
|  **正确**  |  "I lost my job last week."  |
|  **反馈**  |  "lost my job = 失业。found a job = 找到工作（相反！）"  |


### 题目7 — 知识点①巩固【输出层】

**巩固：** `Are you okay?` → 升级为语音跟读

|  **项目**  |  **内容**  |
| --- | --- |
|  **题型**  |  T6 语音跟读 🗣️  |
|  **题目**  |  Your friend looks sad. You want to check on them. Say:  |
|  **提示**  |  "Are you okay?"  |
|  **评估**  |  ✅ 完整 / ✅ 语调温和关切  |
|  **反馈**  |  "语调要柔和——是关心，不是质问。"  |

items.question_title_zh: 题目6 — 知识点③巩固【组装层】
items.prompt: Jake wants to tell someone: I lost my job last week.
items.feedback: "lost my job = 失业。found a job = 找到工作（相反！）"

items.question_title_zh: 题目7 — 知识点①巩固【输出层】
items.prompt: Your friend looks sad. You want to check on them. Say:
items.feedback: "语调要柔和——是关心，不是质问。"

units.summary: 你听到Mrs. Henderson跟Ryan打电话吵架。她在群里变安静。Jake私信你建议。你带蛋糕去陪她。她说"You remind me of Ryan sometimes."

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: You hear Mrs. Henderson's voice through the door — louder than usual. Something is wrong. （你隔着门听见Mrs. Henderson的声音，比平时大得多。一定出了什么事。）
你下楼取快递，路过Mrs. Henderson的门。听到里面在大声说话。
挂电话的声音。你犹豫了一下，继续走了。当天晚些时候，你看群消息——
没有回复。平时她秒回。Jake私信你：

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson (透过门)
entries.text: You PROMISED, Ryan! ...I just want to SEE you!

entries.speaker: Jake (群消息)
entries.text: Hey Mrs. H, are those scones still available? 😋

entries.speaker: Jake (私信)
entries.text: Is Mrs. H okay? She didn't reply today. That never happens.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: I heard something... but I'm not sure.

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Don't push. Just show up.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目1 — 新知识点①首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-show up（出现/去陪她）
items.prompt: Jake says "Just show up." What does he mean?
items.audio: 播放 Jake说 "Don't push. Just show up."
items.feedback: "'Show up' = 出现/去到某人身边。Jake的意思是：别追问，去陪她就好。"

options.label: Go to her place, be with her

entries.text: 你决定去看Mrs. Henderson。你在超市买了一块蛋糕，敲了她的门。
Mrs. Henderson开门。眼睛有点红，但马上笑了。

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Oh! Dear! Come in, come in!

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: I brought cake. For you.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Oh, you didn't have to! That's so sweet.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目2 — 新知识点②首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 句型-You didn't have to（你不必这样/表达感动）
items.prompt: Mrs. Henderson says "You didn't have to!" She feels:
items.audio: 播放 Mrs. Henderson说 "You didn't have to!"
items.feedback: "'You didn't have to' = 你不必这么做（但我很感动）。是表达感激的常见方式。"

entries.text: 你坐在她客厅。她打开电视。你们看了一会儿节目，她没提电话的事，你也没问。

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: This building was so quiet after Ryan left. Nobody knocked on my door.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目3 — 新知识点③首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-That sounds lonely（听起来很孤单 = 表达同情）
items.prompt: Mrs. Henderson says nobody visited her for months. You want to show you care. What do you say?
items.feedback: "'That sounds lonely' = 听起来很孤单。配合 'I'm sorry' 一起用，表达你理解她的感受。"

items.title: 🎭 继续对话（题目后剧情继续）

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: You do not ask about the phone call. You just stay with her. That is enough. （你没有追问那通电话。你只是陪着她。这样就够了。）
你准备离开。Mrs. Henderson送你到门口。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: I'm sorry. That sounds lonely.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: It was. But not anymore.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Thank you for coming, dear.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目4 — 新知识点④首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-I'll come again soon（我会再来的）
items.prompt: You're leaving Mrs. Henderson's apartment. She says "Thank you for coming." You want to let her know you'll be back. What do you say?
items.feedback: "'I'll come again soon' = 我很快会再来。让对方感到安心和被在乎。"

items.title: 🎭 继续对话（题目后剧情继续）

entries.text: 她停了一下。

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: I'll come again soon.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: I'd like that.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: You remind me of Ryan sometimes.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: ...Good night, Mrs. Henderson.

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Good night, dear.

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: The next morning, the group chat comes alive again. Mrs. Henderson sounds more like herself. （第二天早上，群聊重新活跃起来。Mrs. Henderson又像平时的她了。）
第二天。群消息恢复正常了。
Jake私信你：

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson (群消息)
entries.text: Good morning everyone! ☀️ Fresh scones today! Jake, come get yours!

entries.speaker: Jake (群消息)
entries.text: ON MY WAY 🏃

entries.speaker: Jake (私信)
entries.text: Mrs. H is back to normal. Whatever you did — thank you. 🙏

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: This weekend she wants brunch. You, me, Kevin, Lisa. You haven't met them yet.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目5 — 新知识点⑤首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-Whatever you did（你做的不管是什么 = 起作用了）
items.prompt: Jake says "Whatever you did — thank you." He means:
items.audio: 播放Jake说 "Whatever you did — thank you."
items.feedback: "'Whatever you did' = 你做的不管是什么。Jake的意思是：我不知道你具体做了什么，但Mrs. H好了，谢谢你！"

options.label: He doesn't know what you did, but it worked
He is angry about what you did
He wants to know exactly what you did

items.title: 📍 巩固区（2题）
items.content:
### 题目6 — 知识点①巩固【组装层】

**巩固：** `show up` → 升级为句子拼装

|  **项目**  |  **内容**  |
| --- | --- |
|  **题型**  |  T3 句子拼装 🔤  |
|  **题目**  |  Jake's advice: don't ask too many questions. Just go be with her.  |
|  **词块**  |  `Don't` / `push` / `Just` / `show up`  |
|  **干扰块**  |  `give up`  |
|  **正确**  |  "Don't push. Just show up."  |
|  **反馈**  |  "Don't push = 别逼问。Just show up = 去陪着就好。"  |


### 题目7 — 知识点④巩固【输出层】

**巩固：** `I'll come again soon` → 升级为语音跟读

|  **项目**  |  **内容**  |
| --- | --- |
|  **题型**  |  T6 语音跟读 🗣️  |
|  **题目**  |  You're leaving a friend's home. You want them to know you'll be back. Say:  |
|  **提示**  |  "I'll come again soon."  |
|  **评估**  |  ✅ 完整 / ✅ 语调温暖、让人安心  |
|  **反馈**  |  "'I'll come again soon.' 让朋友知道你会再来——这句话本身就是关心。"  |

items.question_title_zh: 题目6 — 知识点①巩固【组装层】
items.prompt: Jake's advice: don't ask too many questions. Just go be with her.
items.feedback: "Don't push = 别逼问。Just show up = 去陪着就好。"

items.question_title_zh: 题目7 — 知识点④巩固【输出层】
items.prompt: You're leaving a friend's home. You want them to know you'll be back. Say:
items.feedback: "'I'll come again soon.' 让朋友知道你会再来——这句话本身就是关心。"

units.summary: Mrs. Henderson家brunch。你认识Kevin和Lisa。Mrs. Henderson说了尴尬的话。Kevin私下问你意见。

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: It's the first time everyone is together in Mrs. Henderson's apartment. The room is warm, loud, and full of food. （这是大家第一次一起聚在Mrs. Henderson家里。屋子里暖暖的、热热闹闹的，到处都是食物的香味。）
周末。你去Mrs. Henderson家参加brunch。敲门进去，看到两个新面孔。
(点头)

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Come in, dear! Everyone, this is 4B!

entries.speaker: Kevin:** _(点头)_ "Hey. Kevin. 3B."**Lisa
entries.text: Hi!! I'm Lisa! 2B! So nice to meet you!

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目1 — 新知识点①首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 句型-初次见面回应
items.prompt: Lisa says "So nice to meet you!" What do you say?
items.feedback: "别人说 'Nice to meet you'，回 'Nice to meet you too!' 简单又礼貌。"

entries.text: 大家坐下来吃东西。Mrs. Henderson做了很多食物。
(看向你)

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Please, eat! Try the scones!

entries.speaker: Jake
entries.text: Mrs. H, these are SO good.

entries.speaker: Lisa
entries.text: Oh my god, delicious!

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目2 — 新知识点②首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 词汇-delicious（很好吃）+ 夸食物
items.prompt: Mrs. Henderson asks "Do you like it?" The food is very good. You say:
items.feedback: "'It's delicious!' 是夸食物最常用的说法。别人请你吃东西时，热情地夸一句会让对方很开心！"

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: At first, everything feels easy and fun. Then the conversation changes, and the room suddenly feels awkward. （一开始，一切都轻松又愉快。可接着，话题突然变了，屋里的气氛一下子变得有点尴尬。）
大家聊了一会儿。然后Mrs. Henderson突然说——
Kevin脸红了。Lisa愣了一秒。
Jake小声跟你说：

entries.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
entries.text: Lisa, you and Kevin should go to that food festival! You both love Thai food!

entries.speaker: Lisa
entries.text: Maybe! We'll see.

entries.speaker: Jake (小声)
entries.text: Kevin likes Lisa.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目3 — 新知识点③首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-Maybe / We'll see（也许/再看看 = 委婉回避）
items.prompt: Lisa says "Maybe! We'll see." She means:
items.feedback: "'Maybe. We'll see.' = 也许吧，再看看。经常表示不想直接回答。"

options.label: She doesn't want to say yes or no

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: Lisa leaves quickly. Kevin stays, but he looks embarrassed. When the others are busy, he quietly asks you what you think. （Lisa很快就走了。Kevin留了下来，可看起来很不好意思。等别人都在忙时，他悄悄来问你怎么看。）
Brunch结束了。Lisa先走了。Kevin留下来洗碗。你在收桌子。Kevin过来小声问你。

entries.speaker: Kevin
entries.text: Hey... was that weird?

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: What do you mean?

entries.speaker: Kevin
entries.text: Me and Lisa. Am I weird?

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: No. I think she just needs time.

entries.speaker: Kevin
entries.text: Yeah... you're right. Thanks.

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目4 — 新知识点④首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-She needs time（她需要时间）
items.prompt: "She just needs time" means:
items.audio: 播放你说 "I think she just needs time."
items.feedback: "'She needs time' = 她还没准备好，给她空间。温和不伤人的说法。"

options.label: She's not ready yet — give her space

entries.speaker: 旁白
entries.text: That night, the awkward moment isn't over yet. Lisa messages you directly. （那天晚上，那份尴尬并没有真正结束。Lisa直接给你发来了私信。）
你回到家。手机震动。Lisa私信你。

entries.speaker: Lisa (私信)
entries.text: Hey — sorry if today was awkward.

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: It's okay!

entries.speaker: Lisa
entries.text: Can we get coffee sometime? Just us?

entries.speaker: You
entries.text: Sure!

entries.speaker: Lisa
entries.text: Cool 😊

items.question_title_zh: 📍 题目5 — 新知识点⑤首现【识别层】
items.knowledge_point: 表达-Sure!（当然好！= 答应邀请）
items.prompt: Lisa asks "Can we get coffee sometime?" You want to say yes. Which is most natural?
items.feedback: "'Sure!' 是答应朋友邀请最自然的说法。轻松、友好、不需要想太多！"

options.label: "I will think about it and let you know later."  太疏远

items.title: 📍 巩固区（2题）
items.content:
### 题目6 — 知识点②巩固【输出层】

**巩固：** `delicious` → 升级为语音跟读

|  **项目**  |  **内容**  |
| --- | --- |
|  **题型**  |  T6 语音跟读 🗣️  |
|  **题目**  |  Your neighbor made food for you. It's very good. Say:  |
|  **提示**  |  "It's delicious!"  |
|  **评估**  |  ✅ "delicious" 发音清晰 / ✅ 语调带热情  |
|  **反馈**  |  "说的时候语调高一点，表达真心喜欢！"  |


### 题目7 — 知识点③巩固【组装层】

**巩固：** `Maybe. We'll see.` → 升级为句子拼装

|  **项目**  |  **内容**  |
| --- | --- |
|  **题型**  |  T3 句子拼装 🔤  |
|  **题目**  |  Someone invites you somewhere but you're not sure. You say:  |
|  **词块**  |  `Maybe` / `We'll` / `see`  |
|  **干扰块**  |  `Sure`  |
|  **正确**  |  "Maybe. We'll see."  |
|  **反馈**  |  "'Maybe. We'll see.' = 不确定时的委婉说法。比直接说 'No' 柔和。"  |

items.question_title_zh: 题目6 — 知识点②巩固【输出层】
items.prompt: Your neighbor made food for you. It's very good. Say:
items.feedback: "说的时候语调高一点，表达真心喜欢！"

items.question_title_zh: 题目7 — 知识点③巩固【组装层】
items.prompt: Someone invites you somewhere but you're not sure. You say:
items.feedback: "'Maybe. We'll see.' = 不确定时的委婉说法。比直接说 'No' 柔和。"
